parameters.query:
-- Validate queues exist and worker has access
SELECT 
  array_agg(qr.queue_name) as valid_queues,
  array_agg(qr.queue_name) FILTER (WHERE qr.is_active = FALSE) as inactive_queues,
  COUNT(qr.queue_name) as found_count
FROM unnest(ARRAY[{{ $json.queueNames.map(q => "'" + q + "'").join(',') }}]) AS requested(queue_name)
LEFT JOIN queue_registry qr ON qr.queue_name = requested.queue_name;

-- Promote scheduled tasks to pending
UPDATE task_queue
SET status = 'pending', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE status = 'scheduled'
AND scheduled_at <= NOW()
AND queue_name = ANY(ARRAY[{{ $('Worker Config').item.json.queueNames.map(q => "'" + q + "'").join(",") }}]);

assignments.name: error

meta.description: Production-ready service worker with queue support, predictive lease management, and comprehensive error handling
changes: Added API key validation at startup
Added worker registration with queue subscriptions
Enhanced queue validation with better error messages
